task: joint prediction of social link behavior and consumption behavior in dynamic SNS
input: dynamic social network graph and user-item consumption graph (with timestamps)
output: predictions for social link formation and item consumption (recommendation)
backbone: dual graph neural network with attentive GCN and GRU
key_idea: disentangle user embeddings from multiple perspectives and fuse them via a dual framework with attentive GCN and GRU to capture high-order dynamic information
datasets: two real-world datasets (not named in abstract)
